description: DNS verified for a www. subdomain (alongside the apex)

expected.subject: Your domain www.patsplumbing.co.uk is verified ✓
expected.body:
Hi Pat,

Quick update — DNS for www.patsplumbing.co.uk is now verified and pointed at
your ModuForge site.

What this means:
  • Your site goes live on this domain on your chosen launch date
  • Email forwarding (if you configured it) is active now
  • TLS certificate is provisioned automatically — no action needed
    from you

Next update from me: when the site goes live.

— Cowork (your ModuForge ops assistant)
